topology_checklist.source_fact: Input display flows to the security module.
topology_checklist.replica_status: Solid horizontal arrow connects input to the security module.

topology_checklist.source_fact: Security module flows to complementary masks.
topology_checklist.replica_status: Solid horizontal arrow reaches the mask cluster.
The stage handoff points into the GPU input port.

topology_checklist.source_fact: Optional anti-OCR/inversion connects downward to GPU.
topology_checklist.replica_status: Dashed vertical annotation reaches the GPU top port without an arrowhead.

topology_checklist.source_fact: Adversarial noise feeds GPU from below.
topology_checklist.replica_status: Magenta upward arrow reaches the GPU bottom port.
Solid navy output arrow reaches the first subframe.
Right-pointing time axis is separated from the refresh caption.
One navy lane reaches a single junction before branching.

topology_checklist.source_fact: Fork routes upward to the eye.
topology_checklist.replica_status: Solid green orthogonal branch reaches the eye node.
Green arrow connects eye to the integration stack.
Green arrow connects the integration stack to the readable output.

topology_checklist.source_fact: Fork routes downward to camera/machine vision.
topology_checklist.replica_status: Dashed orange-red lower branch reaches the camera icon.
Orange-red arrow connects the camera to the frame row.

topology_checklist.source_fact: Frame row produces one sparse fragment.
topology_checklist.replica_status: Orange-red arrow connects the fourth frame to the fragment.
Orange-red arrow terminates at the OCR failure mark.

visual_checklist.source_expectation: Three stage titles share a clear top hierarchy.
visual_checklist.replica_status: All three titles are single-line, aligned, and readable.

visual_checklist.source_expectation: Input, security, masks, and formula are distinct and readable.
visual_checklist.replica_status: All labels remain intact with no broken words or overlaps.

visual_checklist.source_expectation: GPU, optional input, noise input, subframes, and formulas remain separated.
visual_checklist.replica_status: Primary and auxiliary modules are cleanly separated and formulas remain readable.

visual_checklist.source_expectation: Subframes, refresh caption, and time axis do not collide.
visual_checklist.replica_status: The four subframes and two caption rows are visually separated from the time arrow.

visual_checklist.source_expectation: Eye, integration, readable output, and labels occupy distinct zones.
visual_checklist.replica_status: Icons, labels, and green arrows are separated with no clipping.

visual_checklist.source_expectation: Camera, exposure row, selection window, fragment, and OCR failure are distinct.
visual_checklist.replica_status: Vector camera icon, dashed sampling window, fragment, labels, and OCR mark are distinct.

visual_checklist.source_expectation: Flow lines avoid text and preserve solid/dashed route semantics.
visual_checklist.replica_status: All arrows avoid text; human route is solid and camera fork is dashed.

visual_checklist.source_expectation: Outcome distinction does not rely on color alone.
visual_checklist.replica_status: Panel titles, solid/dashed lines, icons, and outcome wording provide redundant encoding.

visual_checklist.source_expectation: Labels and formulas are readable at 7.16-inch publication width.
visual_checklist.replica_status: All English words, formulas, and symbols remain intact in the final Visio export.
